description: AU price comparison via MCP — search, compare, track. 6 tools; anonymous demo (30/day/IP).
name: io.github.aardappvark/gridscoot

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token from https://gridscoot.vercel.app/account/keys. Omit to run in anonymous demo mode (30 requests/day per IP, read tools only).
environmentVariables.name: GRIDSCOOT_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" or "1" to make the write tool (track_price) return a {dryRun:true, would_call:...} envelope instead of executing. Read tools are unaffected.
environmentVariables.name: GRIDSCOOT_MCP_DRY_RUN

title: Gridscoot
